title: Marbella Dolphin Watching: Romantic Boat Hire Guide 2026
html:
Set sail from Puerto Banús for a romantic dolphin-watching cruise along the Costa del Sol. Prices for a private motorboat start from around 280 OMR for a half-day trip. At BoatHire24, you can browse and compare verified boat listings for an unforgettable experience on the Mediterranean.

Where to set off in Marbella

The best departure points are Puerto Banús, Marbella Marina, Cabopino Marina, and the nearby coastal towns of Estepona and Fuengirola. These marinas offer easy access to the dolphin-rich waters of the Alboran Sea. Puerto Banús is the most glamorous, with luxury yacht berths and a vibrant atmosphere. Marbella Marina is quieter and ideal for a romantic start. Cabopino Marina, to the east, is smaller and less crowded. For a longer cruise, leaving from Estepona allows you to explore the coastline towards Gibraltar.

Which boat to rent

Choose a boat that matches your group size and desire for comfort. Here are four popular options for dolphin watching in Marbella.

  1. Rigid Inflatable Boat (RIB): Fast and agile, perfect for getting close to dolphins, up to 6 guests from 180 OMR (half-day).
  2. Small Motorboat: Intimate and easy to handle, up to 8 guests from 280 OMR (half-day). Many couples choose this motor yacht for its sleek lines and comfortable cabin.
  3. Catamaran: Stable and spacious, ideal for a romantic sunset cruise, up to 12 guests from 450 OMR (full-day).
  4. Crewed Motor Yacht: Full service with skipper and crew, up to 10 guests from 700 OMR (full-day).

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Marbella?

Prices range from 50 OMR for a shared tour to over 1,000 OMR for a luxurious crewed yacht. Below is a typical price breakdown.

  • Shared dolphin-watching tour: 50, 80 OMR per person (2, 3 hours).
  • Private RIB or small motorboat (half-day): 180, 350 OMR.
  • Catamaran (full-day, skipper included): 450, 700 OMR.
  • Crewed motor yacht (full-day, up to 10 guests): 700, 1,200 OMR.

Always confirm fuel and taxes with the operator. The best-value option is to hire a boat directly through a verified listing, which often includes a skipper and insurance.

When is the best season for dolphin watching?

Dolphins are present year-round, but the best sightings are from May to October when the sea is calmest. During these months, the Mediterranean is warm and the Levante wind is rare. Winter trips can still be rewarding, especially if you bundle up.

For the most romantic experience, book a sunset cruise. Dolphins are often more active in the late afternoon, and the golden light over the Sierra Blanca mountains is unforgettable.

Do you need a licence to drive a boat in Marbella?

If you rent with a skipper, no licence is required. For self-drive, a valid boating licence recognised in Spain is necessary. The reputable operators on BoatHire24 confirm exact requirements before booking.

At a glance

  • Price band: 50, 1,200+ OMR
  • Peak months: May to October
  • Typical trip length: 2 hours (shared) to full day
  • Capacity: up to 12 guests on most boats
  • Currency: OMR (Omani Rial)
  • Body of water: Mediterranean Sea (Alboran Sea)

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I book a private romantic dinner on a boat?

Many operators offer dinner cruises with catering, often departing from Puerto Banús at sunset.

How close will we get to the dolphins?

Skippers respect wildlife laws and keep a safe distance, but dolphins often approach the boat playfully.

What happens if the weather is bad?

Most listings on BoatHire24 offer free cancellation or rescheduling if the captain deems conditions unsafe.

Are there other marine animals to see?

Whales, sea turtles, and flying fish are also spotted occasionally during the summer months.

Whether you are celebrating an anniversary or simply seeking a memorable day out, boat hire in Marbella offers a romantic escape. If you own a boat in Marbella, you can list a boat for free on BoatHire24 and reach thousands of travellers. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
